description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 8/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for invalid ids, invalid context, stopped agents, and missing agents.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Added edge-case coverage for invalid session ids, invalid per-turn context, stopped runtime pids, and missing agent normalization. Fixed stopped PID chat targets so they return Jidoka not-found validation errors instead of leaking GenServer exits.

title: E2: Add tests for invalid ids, invalid context, stopped agents, and missing agents
